description: Create a two-column content slide on casino hotel selection priorities, with left-side insight text and a right-side horizontal multi-series bar chart comparing overall, women, and men by attribute.

header.headline: When selecting a casino hotel or resort, men and women report different priorities

items.text: 1 in 5 travelers are planning or considering a stay in a casino property this summer. Casino consideration and priorities are similar across income levels.
Some notable differences in priorities occur across generations:
Boomers: 39% cite loyalty rewards, and 70% casino gaming
Gen Z: Restaurants (37%) and entertainment (43%) are more important than they are to other generations

right.title: Top two casino property attributes, women vs. men

footer.source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey. Note: Question: “Which of the following amenities or features are most important to you in choosing a casino property?” (Select top two) (n = 404 travelers planning or considering a stay at a casino hotel/resort in summer 2026). Source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey.
